sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 10:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 10:1
items.html: Bestowal or reception of a Sefira from another is called looking, since they look at one another. (Item 15, and Inner Light, Sub Header, “Parts”)
